name: Venison Tongue
recipeInstructions:
1 Clean the tongue thoroughly, rubbing and rinsing it well.
2 Place the cleaned tongue in a large pan and cover with boiling water.
3 Add all the ingredients to the pan.
4 Cover the pan and simmer slowly (do not boil) for 3-4 hours or until tender.
5 Allow the tongue to cool slightly in the stock before removing it from the pan.
6 Drain the tongue and remove any skin or fat.
7 Serve hot with a wine sauce, or slice cold and serve with a tangy sauce.
8 Serve with fluffy mashed potatoes, buttered baby beets, and a green salad.
